is_remote.description: Whether the repository is remote (requires cloning)

remote_url.description: URL for remote repositories (null for local)

total_commits.description: Total number of commits in the repository

first_commit_date.description: Date of the first commit in ISO 8601 format

last_commit_date.description: Date of the last commit in ISO 8601 format

is_shallow.description: Whether the repository is a shallow clone

is_fork.description: Whether the repository is a fork

language_distribution.description: Distribution of languages in the repository (language -> byte count)
